category_sources: source_facts.description says hack-browser-data decrypts and exports browser data; official README documents browser data extraction and decryption.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official moonD4rk/HackBrowserData repository; official README and repository name use HackBrowserData.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage, commands, flags, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe decrypting and exporting browser data, with categories including passwords, cookies, bookmarks, history, and downloads.
